title: IBM Software Engineering
summary: A full IBM arc from support automation and developer tooling into AI product work for the z/OS team.
description: This is the enterprise capital in Phil's map. It captures the full IBM career arc: starting in support, building automation and developer tools, and learning how to turn repeated operational pain into durable systems.

That foundation grew into broader software engineering across z/OS, Docker, OpenShift, and customer-facing support environments, with public-facing impact visible through the outcomes even when the internal code cannot be shown directly.
Today the city represents Phil's work as a software engineer focused on AI for the IBM z/OS organization, shipping practical AI capabilities and workflows that leverage agents like Bob.

media.alt: A role-focused dashboard mockup representing IBM z/OS software engineering and AI work.
media.caption: A role-and-operations view representing support automation, developer tooling, and modern AI systems work.

media.alt: An industrial walled city representing IBM software engineering work.
media.caption: A heavily fortified city built on automation, reliability, internal tooling, and enterprise AI.

greatWorks.title: Automation Citadel
greatWorks.summary: Operational tooling, support automation, and codified engineering knowledge that turned difficult systems work into repeatable leverage.

relationships.label: Operational rigor carried into public projects

highlights: Started in IBM support, working directly with enterprise and government clients during outage and escalation scenarios.
Built automation and developer tools that turned repeated support work into faster, more repeatable workflows.
Grew into AI-focused software engineering for the z/OS team, shipping practical capabilities tied to Bob and adjacent agent workflows.
productionQueue: Keep carrying enterprise reliability and support automation lessons into public-facing products.
Expand practical agent workflows and AI product thinking into reusable systems.

client.sector: Enterprise infrastructure, developer tooling, and AI software
